data.name: EmailAlreadyExists
data.value: Email already exists in the system: {0}.

data.name: PasswordResetError
data.value: An error occurred during password reset!

data.name: PasswordResetError_ContactSupport
data.value: If the problem persists, please contact support.

data.name: PasswordResetSuccess_EmailNotice
data.value: An email with your new password has been sent to your registered email address.

data.name: PasswordResetSuccess_CloseWindow
data.value: You can now close this window.

data.name: OnlyOneDefaultGroup
data.value: Only one default group is allowed.

data.name: UnableToCastDbSet
data.value: Unable to cast DbSet for type {0}.

data.name: ERR_TOO_MANY_RETRY
data.value: System is too busy, please try again later.

data.name: ERR_SAVE_NO_EFFECT
data.value: Failed to save {0}, please try again or contact the administrator.

data.name: DivisionCodeMaxLength
data.value: Division code must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: DivisionNameMaxLength
data.value: Division name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: DivisionCodeInvalidFormat
data.value: Division code must start with '{0}' followed by exactly {1} digits.

data.name: DepartmentCodeMaxLength
data.value: Department code must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: DepartmentCodeInvalidFormat
data.value: Department code must start with '{0}' followed by exactly {1} digits.

data.name: DepartmentNameMaxLength
data.value: Department name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: AdmissionsQuotaMustBeDraftToDelete
data.value: Cannot delete admissions quota because its status is not Draft. ID: {0}.

data.value: Position code must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: PositionNameMaxLength
data.value: Position name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: MustHasAtLeastOneDepartment
data.value: A position must belong to at least one department.

data.name: MustHasAtLeastOneCompany
data.value: A position must belong to at least one department.

data.name: EmployeeTaxMaxLength
data.value: Tax number must not exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Region code must not exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Region name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: RegionCodeInvalidFormat
data.value: Region code must start with '{0}' and have {1} digits after the prefix.

data.name: EmployeeCodeMaxLength
data.value: Employee code must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: EmployeeCodeInvalidFormat
data.value: Employee code must start with '{0}' and have {1} digits after the prefix.

data.name: CompanyCodeMaxLength
data.value: Company code must not exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Company code must start with '{0}' and have {1} digits after the prefix.

data.name: CompanyNameMaxLength
data.value: Company name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: CompanyAddressMaxLength
data.value: Company address must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: ProvinceCodeMaxLength
data.value: Province code must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: NewRegionStartDateMustBeGreaterThanCurrent
data.value: When changing regions, the start date in the new region must be later than the start date in the current region.

data.name: CurrentAndNewRegionMustBeDifferent
data.value: The current region and the new region must be different.

data.name: WorkingTimeDayOfWeekInvalid
data.value: Day of week must be between 0 (Sunday) and 6 (Saturday).

data.name: WorkingTimeStartTimeMustBeLessThanEndTime
data.value: Start time must be less than end time.

data.name: HolidayNameMaxLength
data.value: Holiday name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: HolidayFrequencyInvalid
data.value: Frequency must be 0 (repeat yearly) or 1 (no repeat).

data.name: WTCNameMaxLength
data.value: Name of configuration must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: HolidayTypeCodeMaxLength
data.value: Holiday type code must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: HolidayTypeCodeInvalidFormat
data.value: Holiday type code must start with '{0}' followed by exactly {1} digits.

data.name: HolidayTypeNameMaxLength
data.value: Holiday type name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: ClassTypeCodeMaxLength
data.value: Class type code must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: ClassTypeNameMaxLength
data.value: Class type name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: ClassTypeStudentCountMaxLength
data.value: Student count must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: ClassTypeSessionsPerWeekGreaterThanZero
data.value: Sessions per week must be greater than 0.

data.name: ClassTypeHoursPerSessionGreaterThanZero
data.value: Hours per session must be greater than 0.

data.name: ClassTypeClassCountNonNegative
data.value: Class count must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: DegreeNameMaxLength
data.value: Degree name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Lecture name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: SD_AuthorNameMaxLength
data.value: Author name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Publish date must be earlier than or equal to end date.

data.value: Document '{0}' already exists for this type.

data.value: Cannot delete this {0} because it contains related data

data.value: Current executors must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.value: Current executors must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.value: Revenue quota per EC must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: AQC_TotalQuotaNonNegative
data.value: Total quota must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.value: This company already has a quota record in the selected admissions quota.

data.value: Current executors must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: AQR_TotalSalesAllocatedNonNegative
data.value: Total sales allocated must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.value: Total quota must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.value: This region already has a quota record in the selected admissions quota.

data.name: AQE_RevenueQuotaNonNegative
data.value: Revenue quota must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.value: Join date must be earlier than or equal to end date.

data.name: AQE_UniqueQuotaEmployeeExists
data.value: This employee already has a quota for the same position in this admissions quota.

data.value: Please input the adjusted total quota.

data.name: AQ_Adjustment_OnlyInProgress
data.value: Adjustments are only allowed when status is In Progress.

data.value: This employee has already been assigned to support this company for the month.

data.value: Fee must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.value: Minimum quantity must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.value: Month quantity must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.value: A similar price rule already exists in this price list.

data.value: Tuition name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.value: You need to select a course.

data.value: Duration hours must be greater than 0.

data.value: Minimum hours must be greater than 0.

data.name: MinHoursLessThanDuration
data.value: Minimum hours must be less than or equal to total duration hours.

data.value: The data has been modified or deleted by another user. Please reload and try again.

data.value: Recruitment title must not exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Salary must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.value: Candidate name must not exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Invalid database context instance. Please check your configuration.

data.value: Starting age of the group is required.

data.name: AgeGroupToRequired
data.value: Ending age of the group is required.

data.value: Starting age of the group must be a positive number.

data.value: Ending age of the group must be a positive number.

data.name: AgeGroupFromLessThanTo
data.value: Starting age must be less than ending age.

data.value: Age group name cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Age group description cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Age group code is invalid. It must start with {0} and be {1} characters long.

data.value: Learning roadmap code cannot contain spaces.

data.value: Learning roadmap name cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Learning roadmap description cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.value: The course code cannot be empty.

data.value: The course code cannot contain spaces.

data.value: The course name cannot be empty.

data.value: The course name cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.value: You need to select a commitment level.

data.value: The commitment level cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.value: You cannot fill in the commitment level because you did not select a commitment output.

data.name: CourseReferenceMaxLength
data.value: The reference information cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: CourseMidExamIdsMaxLength
data.value: The list of midterm exam IDs cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: MidExamIdsMustBeGuids
data.value: Midterm exam IDs must be in GUID.

data.name: CourseFinalExamIdsMaxLength
data.value: The list of final exam IDs cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: FinalExamIdsMustBeGuids
data.value: Final exam IDs must be GUIDs.

data.name: CourseSequenceRange
data.value: The course sequence must be between {0} and {1}.

data.name: MinAvgScoreMustBeGreaterThanZero
data.value: The minimum average score must be greater than 0.

data.name: LearningRoadmapRequired
data.value: You need to select a learning roadmap.

data.name: LearningRoadmapIdNotEmpty
data.value: The learning roadMap cannot be empty.

data.name: LearningRoadmapIdNotFound
data.value: This learning roadMap does not exist.

data.name: MidExamIdsMustBeValidCategorySkill
data.value: Midterm exam IDs must belong to valid skill categories.

data.name: FinalExamIdsMustBeValidCategorySkill
data.value: Final exam IDs must belong to valid skill categories.

data.value: You need to select a tuition.

data.value: The session name cannot be empty.

data.value: The lesson name cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.value: The number of sessions exceeds the maximum allowed.

data.value: The class name cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.value: You need to select a company.

data.value: The class schedule cannot be empty.

data.value: The selected course does not exist or is inactive.

data.value: The class type is invalid or not associated with the course.

data.value: The selected teacher does not exist or is inactive.

data.value: The selected employee does not exist or is inactive.

data.name: ClassTypeNotFound
data.value: The class type does not exist.

data.name: InvalidClassSchedule
data.value: The class schedule is invalid or contains non-existent sessions.

data.value: Each session's duration must be {0} hours.

data.value: The teacher has a schedule conflict on {0} from {1:HH:mm} to {2:HH:mm}.

data.value: Cannot change the class status from Plan to Completed.

data.value: Student code must not exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Beginning level must not exceed {0} characters.

data.value: Final level must not exceed {0} characters.

data.value: "Quality is the honor of Regal Edu's brand"

data.value: The student is trained by Regal Edu and guaranteed to achieve the {0} level upon completion of the programme.

data.value: www.regal.edu.vn | 116 Truong Chinh, Kim Lien, Ha Noi | 1900.966.963

data.name: Notification_CompanyEvent_Proposal_PendingApproval_Message
data.value: Company event proposal '{0}' is waiting for your approval.

data.value: Your company event proposal '{0}' has been approved.
